# 

# hoopR

[**`hoopR`**](https://hoopR.sportsdataverse.org/) is an R package for
working with men’s basketball data.

The package has functions to access **live play by play and box score**
data from ESPN with shot locations when available. As of version 1.3.0,
[**`hoopR`**](https://hoopR.sportsdataverse.org/) is also a full NBA
Stats API wrapper with 127 functions added in this release.

It is additionally a scraping and aggregating interface for Ken
Pomeroy’s men’s college basketball statistics website,
[kenpom.com](https://kenpom.com/). It provides users with an active
subscription the capability to scrape the website tables and analyze the
data for themselves.

## Installation

You can install the CRAN version of
[**`hoopR`**](https://CRAN.R-project.org/package=hoopR) with:

``` r
install.packages("hoopR")
```

You can install the released version of
[**`hoopR`**](https://github.com/sportsdataverse/hoopR/) from
[GitHub](https://github.com/sportsdataverse/hoopR) with:

``` r
# You can install using the pak package using the following code:
if (!requireNamespace('pak', quietly = TRUE)){
  install.packages('pak')
}
pak::pak("sportsdataverse/hoopR")
```

## Quick Start

### **NBA full play-by-play seasons (2002-2026) ~ 1-2 minutes**

``` r
tictoc::tic()
progressr::with_progress({
  nba_pbp <- hoopR::load_nba_pbp()
})
tictoc::toc()
```

``` R
## 2.85 sec elapsed

## 519304 rows of NBA play-by-play data from 1069 games.
```

### **Men’s college basketball full play-by-play seasons (2006-2026) ~ 2-3 minutes**

``` r
tictoc::tic()
progressr::with_progress({
  mbb_pbp <-  hoopR::load_mbb_pbp()
})
tictoc::toc()
```

``` R
## 9.94 sec elapsed

## 2902736 rows of men's college basketball play-by-play data from 6246 games.
```

## **Documentation**

For more information on the package and function reference, please see
the [**`hoopR`** documentation
website](https://hoopR.sportsdataverse.org).

## **Breaking Changes**

[**Full News on
Releases**](https://hoopR.sportsdataverse.org/news/index.html)

## **Citations**

To cite the [**`hoopR`**](https://hoopR.sportsdataverse.org) R package
in publications, use:

BibTex Citation

``` bibtex
@misc{gilani_2021_hoopR,
  author = {Gilani, Saiem},
  title = {hoopR: The SportsDataverse's R Package for Men's Basketball Data.},
  url = {https://hoopR.sportsdataverse.org},
  year = {2021}
}
```

# Package index

## hoopR Data

### NBA Data Functions

Functions exported by hoopR to access the hoopR-data repository’s NBA
Data

- [`load_nba_pbp()`](https://hoopR.sportsdataverse.org/reference/load_nba_pbp.md)
  :

  **Load hoopR NBA play-by-play**

- [`load_nba_team_box()`](https://hoopR.sportsdataverse.org/reference/load_nba_team_box.md)
  :

  **Load hoopR NBA team box scores**

- [`load_nba_player_box()`](https://hoopR.sportsdataverse.org/reference/load_nba_player_box.md)
  :

  **Load hoopR NBA player box scores**

- [`load_nba_schedule()`](https://hoopR.sportsdataverse.org/reference/load_nba_schedule.md)
  :

  **Load hoopR NBA schedules**

- [`update_nba_db()`](https://hoopR.sportsdataverse.org/reference/update_nba_db.md)
  :

  **Update or create a hoopR NBA play-by-play database**

### Men’s College Basketball Data Functions

Functions exported by hoopR to access the hoopR-data repository’s Men’s
College Basketball Data

- [`load_mbb_pbp()`](https://hoopR.sportsdataverse.org/reference/load_mbb_pbp.md)
  :

  **Load hoopR men's college basketball play-by-play**

- [`load_mbb_team_box()`](https://hoopR.sportsdataverse.org/reference/load_mbb_team_box.md)
  :

  **Load hoopR men's college basketball team box scores**

- [`load_mbb_player_box()`](https://hoopR.sportsdataverse.org/reference/load_mbb_player_box.md)
  :

  **Load hoopR men's college basketball player box scores**

- [`load_mbb_schedule()`](https://hoopR.sportsdataverse.org/reference/load_mbb_schedule.md)
  :

  **Load hoopR men's college basketball schedule**

- [`update_mbb_db()`](https://hoopR.sportsdataverse.org/reference/update_mbb_db.md)
  :

  **Update or create a hoopR MBB play-by-play database**

## ESPN Data

### Men’s College Basketball Data Functions

Functions exported by hoopR to access ESPN Men’s College Basketball Data

- [`espn_mbb_betting()`](https://hoopR.sportsdataverse.org/reference/espn_mbb_betting.md)
  :

  **Get ESPN MBB's Betting information**

- [`espn_mbb_conferences()`](https://hoopR.sportsdataverse.org/reference/espn_mbb_conferences.md)
  :

  **Get ESPN conference names and IDs**

- [`espn_mbb_game_all()`](https://hoopR.sportsdataverse.org/reference/espn_mbb_game_all.md)
  :

  **Get ESPN men's college basketball data (Pbp, Team and Player Box)**

- [`espn_mbb_game_rosters()`](https://hoopR.sportsdataverse.org/reference/espn_mbb_game_rosters.md)
  :

  **Get ESPN men's college basketball game rosters**

- [`espn_mbb_pbp()`](https://hoopR.sportsdataverse.org/reference/espn_mbb_pbp.md)
  :

  **Get ESPN men's college basketball PBP data**

- [`espn_mbb_player_box()`](https://hoopR.sportsdataverse.org/reference/espn_mbb_player_box.md)
  :

  **Get ESPN men's college basketball player box scores**

- [`espn_mbb_player_stats()`](https://hoopR.sportsdataverse.org/reference/espn_mbb_player_stats.md)
  :

  **Get ESPN men's college basketball player stats data**

- [`espn_mbb_rankings()`](https://hoopR.sportsdataverse.org/reference/espn_mbb_rankings.md)
  :

  **Get men's college basketball AP and Coaches Poll rankings from
  ESPN**

- [`espn_mbb_scoreboard()`](https://hoopR.sportsdataverse.org/reference/espn_mbb_scoreboard.md)
  :

  **Get ESPN men's college basketball schedule for a specific year**

- [`espn_mbb_standings()`](https://hoopR.sportsdataverse.org/reference/espn_mbb_standings.md)
  :

  **Get ESPN men's college basketball standings**

- [`espn_mbb_team_box()`](https://hoopR.sportsdataverse.org/reference/espn_mbb_team_box.md)
  :

  **Get ESPN men's college basketball team box scores**

- [`espn_mbb_team_current_roster()`](https://hoopR.sportsdataverse.org/reference/espn_mbb_team_current_roster.md)
  :

  **Get ESPN men's college basketball current team roster**

- [`espn_mbb_team_stats()`](https://hoopR.sportsdataverse.org/reference/espn_mbb_team_stats.md)
  :

  **Get ESPN men's college basketball team stats data**

- [`espn_mbb_teams()`](https://hoopR.sportsdataverse.org/reference/espn_mbb_teams.md)
  :

  **Get ESPN men's college basketball team names and IDs**

- [`espn_mbb_wp()`](https://hoopR.sportsdataverse.org/reference/espn_mbb_wp.md)
  :

  **Men's College Basketball win probability chart data from ESPN**

### NBA Data Functions

Functions exported by hoopR to access ESPN’s NBA Data

- [`espn_nba_betting()`](https://hoopR.sportsdataverse.org/reference/espn_nba_betting.md)
  :

  **Get ESPN NBA's Betting information**

- [`espn_nba_game_all()`](https://hoopR.sportsdataverse.org/reference/espn_nba_game_all.md)
  :

  **Get ESPN NBA game data (Pbp, Team and Player Box)**

- [`espn_nba_game_rosters()`](https://hoopR.sportsdataverse.org/reference/espn_nba_game_rosters.md)
  :

  **Get ESPN NBA game rosters**

- [`espn_nba_pbp()`](https://hoopR.sportsdataverse.org/reference/espn_nba_pbp.md)
  :

  **Get ESPN NBA PBP data**

- [`espn_nba_player_box()`](https://hoopR.sportsdataverse.org/reference/espn_nba_player_box.md)
  :

  **Get ESPN NBA player box scores**

- [`espn_nba_player_stats()`](https://hoopR.sportsdataverse.org/reference/espn_nba_player_stats.md)
  :

  **Get ESPN NBA player stats data**

- [`espn_nba_scoreboard()`](https://hoopR.sportsdataverse.org/reference/espn_nba_scoreboard.md)
  :

  **Get ESPN NBA schedule for a specific year**

- [`espn_nba_standings()`](https://hoopR.sportsdataverse.org/reference/espn_nba_standings.md)
  :

  **Get ESPN NBA's Standings**

- [`espn_nba_team_box()`](https://hoopR.sportsdataverse.org/reference/espn_nba_team_box.md)
  :

  **Get ESPN NBA team box scores**

- [`espn_nba_team_current_roster()`](https://hoopR.sportsdataverse.org/reference/espn_nba_team_current_roster.md)
  :

  **Get ESPN NBA current team roster**

- [`espn_nba_team_stats()`](https://hoopR.sportsdataverse.org/reference/espn_nba_team_stats.md)
  :

  **Get ESPN NBA team stats data**

- [`espn_nba_teams()`](https://hoopR.sportsdataverse.org/reference/espn_nba_teams.md)
  :

  **Get ESPN NBA team names and IDs**

- [`espn_nba_wp()`](https://hoopR.sportsdataverse.org/reference/espn_nba_wp.md)
  :

  **Get NBA win probability chart data from ESPN**

## NBA Data

### NBA Stats API

Functions exported by hoopR to access the NBA Stats API

- [`nba_alltimeleadersgrids()`](https://hoopR.sportsdataverse.org/reference/nba_alltimeleadersgrids.md)
  :

  **Get NBA Stats API All-time Leaders Grid**

- [`nba_assistleaders()`](https://hoopR.sportsdataverse.org/reference/nba_assistleaders.md)
  :

  **Get NBA Stats API Assist Leaders**

- [`nba_assisttracker()`](https://hoopR.sportsdataverse.org/reference/nba_assisttracker.md)
  :

  **Get NBA Stats API Assist Tracker**

- [`nba_boxscoreadvancedv2()`](https://hoopR.sportsdataverse.org/reference/nba_boxscoreadvancedv2.md)
  :

  **Get NBA Stats API Boxscore Advanced V2**

- [`nba_boxscoreadvancedv3()`](https://hoopR.sportsdataverse.org/reference/nba_boxscoreadvancedv3.md)
  :

  **Get NBA Stats API Boxscore Advanced V3**

- [`nba_boxscoredefensive()`](https://hoopR.sportsdataverse.org/reference/nba_boxscoredefensive.md)
  :

  **Get NBA Stats API Boxscore Defensive**

- [`nba_boxscoredefensivev2()`](https://hoopR.sportsdataverse.org/reference/nba_boxscoredefensivev2.md)
  :

  **Get NBA Stats API Boxscore Defensive V2**

- [`nba_boxscorefourfactorsv2()`](https://hoopR.sportsdataverse.org/reference/nba_boxscorefourfactorsv2.md)
  **\[deprecated\]** :

  **Get NBA Stats API Boxscore Four Factors V2**

- [`nba_boxscorefourfactorsv3()`](https://hoopR.sportsdataverse.org/reference/nba_boxscorefourfactorsv3.md)
  :

  **Get NBA Stats API Boxscore Four Factors V3**

- [`nba_boxscorehustlev2()`](https://hoopR.sportsdataverse.org/reference/nba_boxscorehustlev2.md)
  **\[deprecated\]** :

  **Get NBA Stats API Boxscore Hustle V2**

- [`nba_boxscorematchups()`](https://hoopR.sportsdataverse.org/reference/nba_boxscorematchups.md)
  :

  **Get NBA Stats API Boxscore Matchups**

- [`nba_boxscorematchupsv3()`](https://hoopR.sportsdataverse.org/reference/nba_boxscorematchupsv3.md)
  :

  **Get NBA Stats API Boxscore Matchups V3**

- [`nba_boxscoremiscv2()`](https://hoopR.sportsdataverse.org/reference/nba_boxscoremiscv2.md)
  **\[deprecated\]** :

  **Get NBA Stats API Boxscore Misc V2**

- [`nba_boxscoremiscv3()`](https://hoopR.sportsdataverse.org/reference/nba_boxscoremiscv3.md)
  :

  **Get NBA Stats API Boxscore Misc V3**

- [`nba_boxscoreplayertrackv2()`](https://hoopR.sportsdataverse.org/reference/nba_boxscoreplayertrackv2.md)
  **\[deprecated\]** :

  **Get NBA Stats API Boxscore Player Tracking V2**

- [`nba_boxscoreplayertrackv3()`](https://hoopR.sportsdataverse.org/reference/nba_boxscoreplayertrackv3.md)
  :

  **Get NBA Stats API Boxscore Player Tracking V3**

- [`nba_boxscorescoringv2()`](https://hoopR.sportsdataverse.org/reference/nba_boxscorescoringv2.md)
  **\[deprecated\]** :

  **Get NBA Stats API Boxscore Scoring V2**

- [`nba_boxscorescoringv3()`](https://hoopR.sportsdataverse.org/reference/nba_boxscorescoringv3.md)
  :

  **Get NBA Stats API Boxscore Scoring V3**

- [`nba_boxscoresimilarityscore()`](https://hoopR.sportsdataverse.org/reference/nba_boxscoresimilarityscore.md)
  :

  **Get NBA Stats API Boxscore Similarity Score**

- [`nba_boxscoresummaryv2()`](https://hoopR.sportsdataverse.org/reference/nba_boxscoresummaryv2.md)
  :

  **Get NBA Stats API Boxscore Summary V2**

- [`nba_boxscoresummaryv3()`](https://hoopR.sportsdataverse.org/reference/nba_boxscoresummaryv3.md)
  :

  **Get NBA Stats API Boxscore Summary V3**

- [`nba_boxscoretraditionalv2()`](https://hoopR.sportsdataverse.org/reference/nba_boxscoretraditionalv2.md)
  :

  **Get NBA Stats API Boxscore Traditional V2**

- [`nba_boxscoretraditionalv3()`](https://hoopR.sportsdataverse.org/reference/nba_boxscoretraditionalv3.md)
  :

  **Get NBA Stats API Boxscore Traditional V3**

- [`nba_boxscoreusagev2()`](https://hoopR.sportsdataverse.org/reference/nba_boxscoreusagev2.md)
  **\[deprecated\]** :

  **Get NBA Stats API Boxscore Usage V2**

- [`nba_boxscoreusagev3()`](https://hoopR.sportsdataverse.org/reference/nba_boxscoreusagev3.md)
  :

  **Get NBA Stats API Boxscore Usage V3**

- [`nba_commonallplayers()`](https://hoopR.sportsdataverse.org/reference/nba_commonallplayers.md)
  :

  **Get NBA Stats API All Players**

- [`nba_commonplayerinfo()`](https://hoopR.sportsdataverse.org/reference/nba_commonplayerinfo.md)
  :

  **Get NBA Stats API Player Info**

- [`nba_commonplayoffseries()`](https://hoopR.sportsdataverse.org/reference/nba_commonplayoffseries.md)
  :

  **Get NBA Stats API Playoff Series**

- [`nba_commonteamroster()`](https://hoopR.sportsdataverse.org/reference/nba_commonteamroster.md)
  :

  **Get NBA Stats API Team Roster**

- [`nba_commonteamyears()`](https://hoopR.sportsdataverse.org/reference/nba_commonteamyears.md)
  :

  **Get NBA Stats API Common Team Years**

- [`nba_cumestatsplayer()`](https://hoopR.sportsdataverse.org/reference/nba_cumestatsplayer.md)
  :

  **Get NBA Stats API Cumulative Player Stats**

- [`nba_cumestatsplayergames()`](https://hoopR.sportsdataverse.org/reference/nba_cumestatsplayergames.md)
  :

  **Get NBA Stats API Cumulative Player Game Stats**

- [`nba_cumestatsteam()`](https://hoopR.sportsdataverse.org/reference/nba_cumestatsteam.md)
  :

  **Get NBA Stats API Cumulative Team Stats**

- [`nba_cumestatsteamgames()`](https://hoopR.sportsdataverse.org/reference/nba_cumestatsteamgames.md)
  :

  **Get NBA Stats API Cumulative Team Game Stats**

- [`nba_data_pbp()`](https://hoopR.sportsdataverse.org/reference/nba_data_pbp.md)
  :

  **Get NBA Data API Play-by-Play**

- [`nba_defensehub()`](https://hoopR.sportsdataverse.org/reference/nba_defensehub.md)
  :

  **Get NBA Stats API Defense Hub**

- [`nba_draftboard()`](https://hoopR.sportsdataverse.org/reference/nba_draftboard.md)
  :

  **Get NBA Stats API Draft Board**

- [`nba_draftcombinedrillresults()`](https://hoopR.sportsdataverse.org/reference/nba_draftcombinedrillresults.md)
  :

  **Get NBA Stats API Draft Combine Drill Results**

- [`nba_draftcombinenonstationaryshooting()`](https://hoopR.sportsdataverse.org/reference/nba_draftcombinenonstationaryshooting.md)
  :

  **Get NBA Stats API Draft Combine Non-Stationary Shooting**

- [`nba_draftcombineplayeranthro()`](https://hoopR.sportsdataverse.org/reference/nba_draftcombineplayeranthro.md)
  :

  **Get NBA Stats API Draft Combine Player Anthropological
  Measurements**

- [`nba_draftcombinespotshooting()`](https://hoopR.sportsdataverse.org/reference/nba_draftcombinespotshooting.md)
  :

  **Get NBA Stats API Draft Combine - Spot Shooting**

- [`nba_draftcombinestats()`](https://hoopR.sportsdataverse.org/reference/nba_draftcombinestats.md)
  :

  **Get NBA Stats API Draft Combine Stats**

- [`nba_drafthistory()`](https://hoopR.sportsdataverse.org/reference/nba_drafthistory.md)
  :

  **Get NBA Stats API Draft History**

- [`nba_dunkscoreleaders()`](https://hoopR.sportsdataverse.org/reference/nba_dunkscoreleaders.md)
  :

  **Get NBA Stats API Dunk Score Leaders**

- [`nba_fantasywidget()`](https://hoopR.sportsdataverse.org/reference/nba_fantasywidget.md)
  :

  **Get NBA Stats API Fantasy Widget**

- [`nba_franchisehistory()`](https://hoopR.sportsdataverse.org/reference/nba_franchisehistory.md)
  :

  **Get NBA Stats API Franchise History**

- [`nba_franchiseleaders()`](https://hoopR.sportsdataverse.org/reference/nba_franchiseleaders.md)
  :

  **Get NBA Stats API Franchise Leaders**

- [`nba_franchiseleaderswrank()`](https://hoopR.sportsdataverse.org/reference/nba_franchiseleaderswrank.md)
  :

  **Get NBA Stats API Franchise Leaders with Rank**

- [`nba_franchiseplayers()`](https://hoopR.sportsdataverse.org/reference/nba_franchiseplayers.md)
  :

  **Get NBA Stats API Franchise Players**

- [`nba_gamerotation()`](https://hoopR.sportsdataverse.org/reference/nba_gamerotation.md)
  :

  **Get NBA Stats API Game Rotation**

- [`nba_glalumboxscoresimilarityscore()`](https://hoopR.sportsdataverse.org/reference/nba_glalumboxscoresimilarityscore.md)
  :

  **Get NBA Stats API G-League Alum Boxscore Similarity Score**

- [`nba_gravityleaders()`](https://hoopR.sportsdataverse.org/reference/nba_gravityleaders.md)
  :

  **Get NBA Stats API Gravity Leaders**

- [`nba_homepageleaders()`](https://hoopR.sportsdataverse.org/reference/nba_homepageleaders.md)
  **\[deprecated\]** :

  **Get NBA Stats API Homepage Leaders**

- [`nba_homepagev2()`](https://hoopR.sportsdataverse.org/reference/nba_homepagev2.md)
  **\[deprecated\]** :

  **Get NBA Stats API HomepageV2 Leaders**

- [`nba_hustlestatsboxscore()`](https://hoopR.sportsdataverse.org/reference/nba_hustlestatsboxscore.md)
  :

  **Get NBA Stats API Hustle Stats Boxscore**

- [`nba_infographicfanduelplayer()`](https://hoopR.sportsdataverse.org/reference/nba_infographicfanduelplayer.md)
  :

  **Get NBA Stats API FanDuel Player Infographic**

- [`nba_iststandings()`](https://hoopR.sportsdataverse.org/reference/nba_iststandings.md)
  :

  **Get NBA Stats API In-Season Tournament Standings**

- [`nba_leaderstiles()`](https://hoopR.sportsdataverse.org/reference/nba_leaderstiles.md)
  **\[deprecated\]** :

  **Get NBA Stats API Leaders Tiles**

- [`nba_leaguedashlineups()`](https://hoopR.sportsdataverse.org/reference/nba_leaguedashlineups.md)
  :

  **Get NBA Stats API League Dashboard Lineups**

- [`nba_leaguedashoppptshot()`](https://hoopR.sportsdataverse.org/reference/nba_leaguedashoppptshot.md)
  :

  **Get NBA Stats API League Dashboard Player Tracking - Opponent
  Shots**

- [`nba_leaguedashplayerbiostats()`](https://hoopR.sportsdataverse.org/reference/nba_leaguedashplayerbiostats.md)
  :

  **Get NBA Stats API League Dashboard Player Biographical Stats**

- [`nba_leaguedashplayerclutch()`](https://hoopR.sportsdataverse.org/reference/nba_leaguedashplayerclutch.md)
  :

  **Get NBA Stats API League Dashboard by Player Clutch Splits**

- [`nba_leaguedashplayerptshot()`](https://hoopR.sportsdataverse.org/reference/nba_leaguedashplayerptshot.md)
  :

  **Get NBA Stats API League Dashboard Player Tracking - Player Shots**

- [`nba_leaguedashplayershotlocations()`](https://hoopR.sportsdataverse.org/reference/nba_leaguedashplayershotlocations.md)
  :

  **Get NBA Stats API League Dashboard Player Shot Locations**

- [`nba_leaguedashplayerstats()`](https://hoopR.sportsdataverse.org/reference/nba_leaguedashplayerstats.md)
  :

  **Get NBA Stats API League Dashboard Player Stats**

- [`nba_leaguedashptdefend()`](https://hoopR.sportsdataverse.org/reference/nba_leaguedashptdefend.md)
  :

  **Get NBA Stats API League Dashboard Player Tracking - Defense**

- [`nba_leaguedashptstats()`](https://hoopR.sportsdataverse.org/reference/nba_leaguedashptstats.md)
  :

  **Get NBA Stats API League Dashboard Player Tracking - Stats**

- [`nba_leaguedashptteamdefend()`](https://hoopR.sportsdataverse.org/reference/nba_leaguedashptteamdefend.md)
  :

  **Get NBA Stats API League Dashboard Player Tracking - Team Defense**

- [`nba_leaguedashteamclutch()`](https://hoopR.sportsdataverse.org/reference/nba_leaguedashteamclutch.md)
  :

  **Get NBA Stats API League Dashboard by Team Clutch Splits**

- [`nba_leaguedashteamptshot()`](https://hoopR.sportsdataverse.org/reference/nba_leaguedashteamptshot.md)
  :

  **Get NBA Stats API League Dashboard Player Tracking - Team Shots**

- [`nba_leaguedashteamshotlocations()`](https://hoopR.sportsdataverse.org/reference/nba_leaguedashteamshotlocations.md)
  :

  **Get NBA Stats API League Dashboard Team Shot Locations**

- [`nba_leaguedashteamstats()`](https://hoopR.sportsdataverse.org/reference/nba_leaguedashteamstats.md)
  :

  **Get NBA Stats API League Dashboard Team Stats**

- [`nba_leaguegamefinder()`](https://hoopR.sportsdataverse.org/reference/nba_leaguegamefinder.md)
  :

  **Get NBA Stats API League Game Streak Finder**

- [`nba_leaguegamelog()`](https://hoopR.sportsdataverse.org/reference/nba_leaguegamelog.md)
  :

  **Get NBA Stats API League Game Log**

- [`nba_leaguehustlestatsplayer()`](https://hoopR.sportsdataverse.org/reference/nba_leaguehustlestatsplayer.md)
  :

  **Get NBA Stats API League Hustle Stats Player**

- [`nba_leaguehustlestatsplayerleaders()`](https://hoopR.sportsdataverse.org/reference/nba_leaguehustlestatsplayerleaders.md)
  :

  **Get NBA Stats API League Hustle Stats Player Leaders**

- [`nba_leaguehustlestatsteam()`](https://hoopR.sportsdataverse.org/reference/nba_leaguehustlestatsteam.md)
  :

  **Get NBA Stats API League Hustle Stats Team**

  :

  **Get NBA Stats API League Hustle Stats Team Leaders**

### NBA G-League Stats API

Functions exported by hoopR to access the NBA G-League Stats API

- [`nbagl_live_boxscore()`](https://hoopR.sportsdataverse.org/reference/nbagl_live_boxscore.md)
  :

  **Get NBA G-League Stats API Live Boxscore**

- [`nbagl_live_pbp()`](https://hoopR.sportsdataverse.org/reference/nbagl_live_pbp.md)
  :

  **Get NBA G-League Stats API Live play-by-play**

- [`nbagl_pbp()`](https://hoopR.sportsdataverse.org/reference/nbagl_pbp.md)
  :

  **Get NBA Data API Play-by-Play for G-League Games**

- [`nbagl_players()`](https://hoopR.sportsdataverse.org/reference/nbagl_players.md)
  :

  **Get G League Player Data Base from NBA API**

- [`nbagl_schedule()`](https://hoopR.sportsdataverse.org/reference/nbagl_schedule.md)
  :

  **Get G League Schedule from NBA API**

- [`nbagl_standings()`](https://hoopR.sportsdataverse.org/reference/nbagl_standings.md)
  :

  **Get Current G League Standings from NBA API**

## NCAA Data

### NCAA Data Functions

Functions exported by hoopR to access NCAA Men’s College Basketball Data

- [`ncaa_mbb_NET_rankings()`](https://hoopR.sportsdataverse.org/reference/ncaa_mbb_NET_rankings.md)
  :

  **Get men's college basketball NET rankings for the current date from
  the NCAA website**

- [`ncaa_mbb_teams()`](https://hoopR.sportsdataverse.org/reference/ncaa_mbb_teams.md)
  :

  **Scrape NCAA Men's Baskebtall Teams (Division I, II, and III)**

## KenPom Data

### KenPom Data Functions

Functions exported by hoopR

- [`kp_arenas()`](https://hoopR.sportsdataverse.org/reference/kp_arenas.md)
  :

  **Get Home Court Arenas**

- [`kp_box()`](https://hoopR.sportsdataverse.org/reference/kp_box.md) :

  **Get KenPom Game Box Score**

- [`kp_coach_history()`](https://hoopR.sportsdataverse.org/reference/kp_coach_history.md)
  :

  **Get KenPom's coaching resume data**

- [`kp_conf()`](https://hoopR.sportsdataverse.org/reference/kp_conf.md)
  :

  **Get KenPom's conference-wide stats**

- [`kp_confhistory()`](https://hoopR.sportsdataverse.org/reference/kp_confhistory.md)
  :

  **Get KenPom's historical conference ratings**

- [`kp_confstats()`](https://hoopR.sportsdataverse.org/reference/kp_confstats.md)
  :

  **Get KenPom's conference comparison stats**

- [`kp_efficiency()`](https://hoopR.sportsdataverse.org/reference/kp_efficiency.md)
  :

  **Get KenPom Efficiency and Tempo Summary**

- [`kp_fanmatch()`](https://hoopR.sportsdataverse.org/reference/kp_fanmatch.md)
  :

  **Get FanMatch by date**

- [`kp_foul_trouble()`](https://hoopR.sportsdataverse.org/reference/kp_foul_trouble.md)
  :

  **Get 2-Foul Participation Stats**

- [`kp_fourfactors()`](https://hoopR.sportsdataverse.org/reference/kp_fourfactors.md)
  :

  **Get Four Factors Data**

- [`kp_game_attrs()`](https://hoopR.sportsdataverse.org/reference/kp_game_attrs.md)
  :

  **Get Game Attributes**

- [`kp_gameplan()`](https://hoopR.sportsdataverse.org/reference/kp_gameplan.md)
  :

  **Get KenPom's team game plan page**

- [`kp_hca()`](https://hoopR.sportsdataverse.org/reference/kp_hca.md) :

  **Get Home Court Advantage Estimates**

- [`kp_height()`](https://hoopR.sportsdataverse.org/reference/kp_height.md)
  :

  **Get Heights, Experience, Bench and Continuity Data**

- [`kp_kpoy()`](https://hoopR.sportsdataverse.org/reference/kp_kpoy.md)
  :

  **Get KPoY Leaders Tables**

- [`kp_minutes_matrix()`](https://hoopR.sportsdataverse.org/reference/kp_minutes_matrix.md)
  :

  **Get Minutes Matrix from Expanded Player Page**

- [`kp_officials()`](https://hoopR.sportsdataverse.org/reference/kp_officials.md)
  :

  **Get officials rankings**

- [`kp_opptracker()`](https://hoopR.sportsdataverse.org/reference/kp_opptracker.md)
  :

  **Get KenPom's team opponent tracker page**

- [`kp_player_career()`](https://hoopR.sportsdataverse.org/reference/kp_player_career.md)
  :

  **Get KenPom's player career stats from the player page**

- [`kp_playerstats()`](https://hoopR.sportsdataverse.org/reference/kp_playerstats.md)
  :

  **Get Player Stats Leaders by Metric**

- [`kp_pointdist()`](https://hoopR.sportsdataverse.org/reference/kp_pointdist.md)
  :

  **Get Team Points Distribution**

- [`kp_pomeroy_archive_ratings()`](https://hoopR.sportsdataverse.org/reference/kp_pomeroy_archive_ratings.md)
  :

  **Get KenPom's ratings archive pages**

- [`kp_pomeroy_ratings()`](https://hoopR.sportsdataverse.org/reference/kp_pomeroy_ratings.md)
  :

  **Get KenPom Ratings**

- [`kp_program_ratings()`](https://hoopR.sportsdataverse.org/reference/kp_program_ratings.md)
  :

  **Get KenPom's program ratings**

- [`kp_referee()`](https://hoopR.sportsdataverse.org/reference/kp_referee.md)
  :

  **Get referee game log**

- [`kp_team_depth_chart()`](https://hoopR.sportsdataverse.org/reference/kp_team_depth_chart.md)
  :

  **Get Depth Chart Last 5 Games from Team Page**

- [`kp_team_history()`](https://hoopR.sportsdataverse.org/reference/kp_team_history.md)
  :

  **Get KenPom's team efficiency history**

- [`kp_team_lineups()`](https://hoopR.sportsdataverse.org/reference/kp_team_lineups.md)
  :

  **Get Lineups Last 5 Games from Team Page**

- [`kp_team_player_stats()`](https://hoopR.sportsdataverse.org/reference/kp_team_player_stats.md)
  :

  **Get Team Player Stats**

- [`kp_team_players()`](https://hoopR.sportsdataverse.org/reference/kp_team_players.md)
  :

  **Get KenPom's player stats from the team page**

- [`kp_team_schedule()`](https://hoopR.sportsdataverse.org/reference/kp_team_schedule.md)
  :

  **Get team schedule results**

- [`kp_teamstats()`](https://hoopR.sportsdataverse.org/reference/kp_teamstats.md)
  :

  **Get Team Stats**

- [`kp_trends()`](https://hoopR.sportsdataverse.org/reference/kp_trends.md)
  :

  **Get Division-I statistical trends**

- [`login()`](https://hoopR.sportsdataverse.org/reference/kp_user_pw.md)
  [`kp_user_email()`](https://hoopR.sportsdataverse.org/reference/kp_user_pw.md)
  [`kp_password()`](https://hoopR.sportsdataverse.org/reference/kp_user_pw.md)
  [`has_kp_user_and_pw()`](https://hoopR.sportsdataverse.org/reference/kp_user_pw.md)
  :

  **KenPom Login and Password credentials**

- [`kp_winprob()`](https://hoopR.sportsdataverse.org/reference/kp_winprob.md)
  :

  **Get KenPom Win Probability**

## Helper Functions and Data

### Included data

Data included within the package

- [`teams_links`](https://hoopR.sportsdataverse.org/reference/teams_links.md)
  :

  **Men's College Basketball KenPom Teams Dictionary** Team link KenPom
  reference lookup for the package

### hoopR Helper Functions

Internal functions used by hoopR

- [`login()`](https://hoopR.sportsdataverse.org/reference/kp_user_pw.md)
  [`kp_user_email()`](https://hoopR.sportsdataverse.org/reference/kp_user_pw.md)
  [`kp_password()`](https://hoopR.sportsdataverse.org/reference/kp_user_pw.md)
  [`has_kp_user_and_pw()`](https://hoopR.sportsdataverse.org/reference/kp_user_pw.md)
  :

  **KenPom Login and Password credentials**

- [`check_status()`](https://hoopR.sportsdataverse.org/reference/check_status.md)
  :

  **Check Status function**

- [`clean_team_names_NCAA_merge()`](https://hoopR.sportsdataverse.org/reference/clean_team_names_NCAA_merge.md)
  :

  **Clean KenPom Data Frame Team Names to match NCAA Team Names for
  easier merging**

- [`csv_from_url()`](https://hoopR.sportsdataverse.org/reference/csv_from_url.md)
  :

  **Load .csv / .csv.gz file from a remote connection**

- [`rds_from_url()`](https://hoopR.sportsdataverse.org/reference/rds_from_url.md)
  :

  **Load .rds file from a remote connection**

- [`rejoin_schedules()`](https://hoopR.sportsdataverse.org/reference/rejoin_schedules.md)
  :

  **rejoin schedules (when used from league game finder)**

- [`most_recent_mbb_season()`](https://hoopR.sportsdataverse.org/reference/most_recent_mbb_season.md)
  :

  **Most Recent Men's College Basketball Season**

- [`most_recent_nba_season()`](https://hoopR.sportsdataverse.org/reference/most_recent_nba_season.md)
  :

  **Most Recent NBA Season**

- [`progressively()`](https://hoopR.sportsdataverse.org/reference/progressively.md)
  :

  **Progressively**

- [`year_to_season()`](https://hoopR.sportsdataverse.org/reference/year_to_season.md)
  :

  **year to season (XXXX -\> XXXX-YY)**

- [`request_with_proxy()`](https://hoopR.sportsdataverse.org/reference/request_with_proxy.md)
  :

  **Retry http request with proxy**

- [`helper_espn_nba_pbp()`](https://hoopR.sportsdataverse.org/reference/helper_espn_nba_pbp.md)
  :

  **Parse ESPN NBA PBP, helper function**

- [`helper_espn_nba_team_box()`](https://hoopR.sportsdataverse.org/reference/helper_espn_nba_team_box.md)
  :

  **Parse ESPN NBA Team Box, helper function**

- [`helper_espn_nba_player_box()`](https://hoopR.sportsdataverse.org/reference/helper_espn_nba_player_box.md)
  :

  **Parse ESPN NBA Player Box, helper function**

- [`helper_espn_mbb_pbp()`](https://hoopR.sportsdataverse.org/reference/helper_espn_mbb_pbp.md)
  :

  **Parse ESPN MBB PBP, helper function**

- [`helper_espn_mbb_team_box()`](https://hoopR.sportsdataverse.org/reference/helper_espn_mbb_team_box.md)
  :

  **Parse ESPN MBB Team Box, helper function**

- [`helper_espn_mbb_player_box()`](https://hoopR.sportsdataverse.org/reference/helper_espn_mbb_player_box.md)
  :

  **Parse ESPN MBB Player Box, helper function**

- [`.players_on_court`](https://hoopR.sportsdataverse.org/reference/dot-players_on_court.md)
  :

  **Add players on court in NBA Stats API play-by-play**

- [`.players_on_court_v3`](https://hoopR.sportsdataverse.org/reference/dot-players_on_court_v3.md)
  :

  **Add players on court in NBA Stats API V3 play-by-play**

- [`.v3_to_v2_format`](https://hoopR.sportsdataverse.org/reference/dot-v3_to_v2_format.md)
  :

  **Convert V3 PBP columns to V2-compatible format**

- [`.build_player_roster`](https://hoopR.sportsdataverse.org/reference/dot-build_player_roster.md)
  :

  **Build player roster lookup from boxscore data**

# Articles

### All vignettes

- [Getting Started with
  hoopR](https://hoopR.sportsdataverse.org/articles/getting-started-hoopR.md):

  Getting started with using `hoopR` and men’s basketball data.

- [KenPom Example
  Functions](https://hoopR.sportsdataverse.org/articles/kenpom-example-functions.md):

  Some examples to get started with using `hoopR` and KenPom’s men’s
  college basketball website.
